summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring 'The Bottom Is In' and forecasting higher Bitcoin prices after months of shorting ETH.
narrative: His latest analysis explicitly calls a market bottom, identifying STRC as a potential catalyst for marginal buying that could propel BTC upward. This marks a sharp reversal from his dominant strategy over the previous months—where he successfully shorted large amounts of Ethereum—as he now argues against 4-Year Cycle bearish theories.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
